title: List Data Streams
content:
# List Data Streams

Returns a list of Data Streams and its parameters. The Data Streams can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`POST /datastreams/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.datastreams.listDataStreams()
print(response)

data_type_names.description: A filter on the list based on the key `data_type_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

names.description: A filter on the list based on the  Data Stream key `name`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Each string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

types.description: A filter on the list based on the Data Stream key `type`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`.

items.description: Specifies the technique used for generating data in the Data Stream.

search.description: Search and filter on the list based on the keys `title` (Display Name) or `name`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`.

semantic_type_names.description: A filter on the list based on the key `semantic_type_name`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

unit_names.description: A filter on the list based on the key `unit_name`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Each string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
